translation.about_desc: We aim to simplify healthcare in Algeria through technology and innovation.
translation.mission_desc: Providing fast and easy access to healthcare for all Algerian citizens in all wilayas.
translation.values_desc: Privacy, trust, and transparency are the core pillars upon which we build our platform.
translation.vision_desc: To be the premier and leading destination in the field of digital health in our region.
translation.learn_more_subtitle: Our team is ready to answer all your questions and suggestions.
translation.start_journey_btn: Start your journey with us now
translation.contact_subtitle: Are you a doctor or clinic owner? We are here to help you with your digital transformation.
translation.contact_success_title: Your message has been sent successfully!
translation.contact_success_desc: Thank you for contacting us. Our team will review your request and contact you as soon as possible.
translation.note_desc: The technical support team will respond to your inquiries within 24 business hours.
translation.register_clinic_desc: Join the largest medical network in Algeria and increase your clinic's visibility.
translation.why_join_2: Full clinic profile with photos and specialties.
translation.why_join_3: Direct communication with patients via a secure chat system.
translation.why_join_4: Periodic statistics and reports on your clinic's activity.
translation.join_verification_msg: Our team will contact you within 24 hours to verify the data and activate the account.
translation.search_doctor_desc: Search by specialty, location or name
translation.attend_consult_desc: Get care at the scheduled time
translation.about_tabibi_desc1: Tabibi is an online medical appointment booking platform that simplifies the connection between patients and healthcare professionals. Our mission is to make healthcare access simpler, faster, and more accessible to everyone.
translation.about_tabibi_desc2: Thousands of patients trust Tabibi to organize their medical appointments with ease and security.
translation.how_it_works_subtitle: A few simple steps separate you from your next medical appointment:
translation.step1_desc: Easily find a healthcare professional by specialty, location, or name, and read patient reviews.
translation.step2_desc: Access real-time availability and book in a few clicks, anytime.
translation.step3_desc: Receive immediate confirmation of your appointment along with reminders so you never forget.
translation.step4_desc: Communicate with the clinic via the built-in messaging system to ask your questions before the consultation.
translation.privacy_policy_subtitle: Protecting your personal data is a priority. We are committed to processing it in compliance with Law No. 18-07 on the protection of personal data in Algeria.
translation.privacy_section1_desc: We collect the data necessary for managing your account and booking appointments, including: name, phone number, email address, and information related to your appointments.
translation.privacy_section2_desc: Your data is retained for the duration necessary to use the service, then archived or deleted in accordance with applicable regulations.
translation.privacy_section3_desc: Personal data collected on this application is processed by Tabibi.
translation.privacy_section4_desc: Your data is used to: manage your medical appointments, send you reminders and notifications, and improve our services.
translation.privacy_section5_desc: Health data is considered sensitive and is treated with a reinforced level of security. It is accessible only to the relevant healthcare professionals.
translation.privacy_section6_desc: Your data is transmitted only to the healthcare professionals involved in your appointments. It may also be processed by our technical service providers (hosting, maintenance), in strict compliance with confidentiality.
translation.privacy_section7_desc: We implement technical and organizational measures to ensure the security and confidentiality of your data.
translation.privacy_section8_desc: In accordance with the law, you have the right to access, rectify, and delete your data. You can exercise these rights at any time via your account or by contacting us.
translation.privacy_section9_desc: For any questions regarding your personal data: contact@tabibi.dz
translation.terms_subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using the platform.
translation.term1_desc: Use of the Tabibi platform implies full acceptance of these terms of use. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the service.
translation.term2_desc: The user is responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their login credentials and all activities carried out from their account. They agree to provide accurate and up-to-date information.
translation.term3_desc: The platform acts as an intermediary connecting patients and healthcare professionals. Doctors and healthcare facilities are solely responsible for the care, consultations, and medical information provided.
translation.term4_desc: The user can book, modify, or cancel their appointments via the platform. They agree to provide accurate information when booking.
translation.term5_desc: The user agrees to respect the appointment times. In case of an impediment, they are required to cancel or modify their appointment within a reasonable time.
translation.term6_desc: The platform cannot be held responsible for cancellations, delays, or improper execution of a consultation by a healthcare professional.
translation.term7_desc: We strive to ensure continuous access to the platform without guaranteeing permanent or uninterrupted availability.
translation.term8_desc: These terms may be modified at any time. Users will be informed in case of an update.
translation.term9_desc: For any questions regarding the terms of use: contact@tabibi.dz
translation.select_date_time_desc: Choose the right date and time for you
translation.no_schedule_desc: Please contact the clinic directly or try again later.
